pageContext.name: Steel Bone 09 Fighting Mecha (Silver Guardian)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Joytoy are proud to present the Steel Bone 08 Fighting Mecha (Silver Guardian) Mecha Collectible Figure from the Dark Source line of collectibles.  Dark Source is an original line of scaled mecha, presenting a wide array of futuristic military vehicles, as well as the people who pilot and service them, from an imaginatively realized science-fiction world where different factions compete for control over a mysterious but powerful dark source energy.  The pilot and mecha both are manufactured with exacting and excruciating detail, perfect for creating your own original scenes or even those based on other popular mech franchises such as BATTLETECH, MechWarrior or Titanfall. Add to your collection today!
